div.h1: Buffer Pool Frame Array Memory Layout
div.p: Frame struct × N contiguous in memory — aligned to 4096-byte boundary for O_DIRECT I/O
When using O_DIRECT, buffers must be aligned to the filesystem block size (usually 4096 bytes).
Recommendation: For high-performance I/O, the metadata must be moved to a separate array so that the page data block is perfectly contiguous and page-aligned.
